purpose: To provide a functional, basic e-commerce platform allowing customers to browse products, manage a shopping cart, complete a mock checkout process, place orders, and view their order history.
scope_in: Shopping cart management (add, remove, update quantity)
scope_out: User authentication beyond basic session management
business_rules: Only in-stock products can be ordered.
Cart total must be calculated before checkout.
Payment is mocked in the MVP.
constraints: The first version focuses on catalog, cart, checkout, and orders.
assumptions: Users access the system through a web browser.
Admin product management can be added after MVP.

functional_requirements.title: Product Catalog Browsing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow customers to view a list of all available products with basic information (Name, Price, Image).

acceptance_criteria.description: The catalog page must display at least the product name, price, and a thumbnail image for every available item.
The system must allow filtering or sorting of products by category or price range.

functional_requirements.title: Product Details View
functional_requirements.description: The system must display comprehensive details for a selected product, including description, stock status, and variations (if applicable).

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page must display the full description, SKU, and current stock level.
The user must be able to select a quantity and add the item to the cart from the product detail page.

functional_requirements.title: Shopping Cart Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow customers to view, modify, and calculate the total cost of items in their shopping cart.

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart must display the product name, selected quantity, unit price, and subtotal for every item.
Users must be able to increase or decrease the quantity of an item in the cart.
Users must be able to remove items entirely from the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Checkout Process
functional_requirements.description: The system must guide the user through the checkout steps, collecting necessary shipping and billing information.

acceptance_criteria.description: The checkout process must require the user to input valid shipping address details.
The system must calculate and display the final total, including taxes and shipping fees (if applicable).

functional_requirements.title: Order Placement
functional_requirements.description: The system must finalize the transaction, process the order, and generate a confirmation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Upon successful submission, the system must generate a unique Order ID and confirm the order status as 'Processing'.
The system must record the order details, including items, quantities, final price, and shipping address.

functional_requirements.title: Order History Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow logged-in customers to view a list of their past orders and their current status.

acceptance_criteria.description: The order history page must list the Order ID, date placed, and current status (e.g., Processing, Shipped).
Clicking on an order ID must display a detailed summary of that specific order.

non_functional_requirements.description: The system must load critical pages (Catalog, Product Detail) within 3 seconds under normal load.

acceptance_criteria.description: The catalog page must load fully within 3 seconds when accessed by 10 concurrent users.

non_functional_requirements.description: All user input (especially addresses and quantities) must be validated and sanitized to prevent injection attacks.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must reject non-numeric characters in quantity fields.

non_functional_requirements.description: The user interface must be intuitive, requiring minimal training for a first-time user to complete a purchase.

acceptance_criteria.description: The checkout process must be linear and clearly guide the user from shipping details to payment confirmation.

use_cases.title: Browse and Select Product
preconditions: Customer is logged in (or browsing anonymously).
main_flow: Customer navigates to the catalog page.
Customer selects a product of interest.
System displays the Product Details Page.
alternative_flows: Product is out of stock (System displays 'Out of Stock' message).

use_cases.title: Manage Shopping Cart
preconditions: Customer has added at least one item to the cart.
main_flow: Customer adjusts quantity or removes an item.
System recalculates the cart total instantly.
alternative_flows: Cart is empty (System prompts user to browse products).

use_cases.title: Complete Purchase
main_flow: Customer reviews the final order summary.
System confirms the order and redirects to the history page.
alternative_flows: Validation error (e.g., invalid address) occurs (System prompts user to correct data).

use_cases.title: View Order History
main_flow: System displays a list of past orders.
Customer selects an order to view details.
System displays the full order summary and status.
